final_text:
The fix is clear. The `to_python` method in `ModelChoiceField` raises `ValidationError` without passing `params={'value': value}`, unlike other fields that properly pass the value for substitution.

{"file":"django/forms/models.py","class":"ModelChoiceField","method":"to_python","parent_class":"ChoiceField","fix_summary":"The ValidationError raised for an invalid choice must pass `params={'value': value}` so the `%(value)s` placeholder in the error message gets substituted with the actual submitted value."}

parsed_answer.fix_summary: The ValidationError raised for an invalid choice must pass `params={'value': value}` so the `%(value)s` placeholder in the error message gets substituted with the actual submitted value.
